items.title: Backbone’s iPhone/Android mobile gaming controllers starting just $60 for Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
items.summary:
Over at Amazon, you’ll find the official Backbone storefront offering its latest Backbone Pro wireless controller for $139.99 shipped. This particular model debuted around the same time last year carrying a $170 price tag, and discounts have been relatively rare since launch, with most meaningful drops reserved for major sale events like Prime Day and Black Friday. It dipped to the $135 range during last year’s Black Friday sale, and today’s deal lands it within $5 of that all-time low. You’ll also find the brand’s standard Backbone One 2nd-gen models starting at $60 right now. Head below for more details.

items.title: Mantis Biotech is making ‘digital twins’ of humans to help solve medicine’s data availability problem
items.summary: Mantis takes disparate sources of data to make synthetic datasets that can be used to build so-called "digital twins" of the human body, representing anatomy, physiology and behavior.

items.title: EcoFlow’s final March power station flash sale drops 3,072Wh DELTA 3 Ultra to $1,099 + 4,096Wh DELTA Pro 3 to $2,099, more
items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Spring Sale event on power stations, which is running parallel to Amazon’s ongoing Big Spring Sale, EcoFlow has launched the final 48-hour flash sale of March, which cuts up to 61% off the tags for two power stations, a DELTA Pro expansion battery, and a portable AC/heater. Among the two backup power solutions, this 48-hour window lets you jump on the extremely versatile EcoFlow DELTA Pro 3 4,096Wh Portable Power Station at $2,099 shipped, matching its current Amazon spring sale pricing. While we have seen the price spike up to its $3,699 MSRP a few times in 2026, it’s more often kept down between $2,299 and $3,066 most of the time in the new year, with today’s rate beaten out by falls to $1,999, as well as a one-time drop to its latest $1,899 low back in mid-January. For the next two days, you can grab one with a 43% markdown that cuts $1,600 off the tag for the third-lowest price we have tracked (and the second-lowest recurring discount). Of course, if you want to save a bit more for a smaller unit, the 3,072Wh DELTA 3 Ultra Portable Power Station is down at its second-lowest $1,099 rate, beating out Amazon by $100. Head below for the other flash offers while they’re still live.

more…

items.title: Ditch your bulky power bank while this wildly thin 10K aluminum model with built-in USB-C cable is down to just $20
items.summary:
LISEN 10,000mAh slim power bank with built-in USB-C cable

Buy for $20 (Reg. Up to $35)

Enter promo code 7OZ2GYAM for $5 off.

What we love

This LISEN power bank comes in at just half an inch thick while still delivering a full 10,000mAh capacity. It features a built-in braided USB-C cable that also works as a handy lanyard, eliminating the need to carry an extra cord. While it skips wireless charging, it provides dependable wired output up to 22.5W and includes a small display to keep tabs on the remaining battery.

items.title: Big Spring Sale game deals: Animal Crossing Switch 2 Edition, Death Stranding 2, Lost Soul Aside, more
items.summary:
Alongside some notable PS5 titles we spotted on sale as part of the Amazon Big Spring Sale you’ll find down below, we also have Woot offering the Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition down at $55.99 this morning. Shipping is free for Prime members but you’ll get hit with a $6 delivery fee otherwise. This one carries a regular price at $65 and is currently fetching as much at Amazon. If you already have the Switch edition you can just grab the upgrade pack on the eShop for $4.99, but if not this is the complete Switch 2 edition with “enhanced resolution, mouse control support for faster and easier decorating, a megaphone for calling your animal residents that uses the system microphone, and more.” 

  • Death Stranding 2: On The Beach $30 (Reg. $70)
  • Lost Soul Aside $50 (Reg. $60)
